title: anoectochilus subregularis
intro: Anoectochilus subregularis, also known as the Chinese orchid or green dragon, is a type of flowering plant native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anoectochilus subregularis include reducing fever, treating respiratory and urinary tract infections, and alleviating symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. In herbal preparations, Anoectochilus subregularis is often used in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is commonly combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
